economic_notes: Nation operates Bulk Fuel, Smoke Shop, VLT/Community Complex, Tobacco Tax, and Economic Development Corporation. Rapid Housing Initiative underway. Multiplex project under construction with $3.2M Peace Hills Trust loan approved.
notes: Fiscal year end is March 31, 2022 - this is a 2022 year-end statement, not 2024. Auditor report signed February 11, 2025, which is nearly 3 years after year-end - highly unusual delay. Note 17 expenses by object total is $24,763,708 but Statement 2 shows $60,571,982 total expenses - the difference of ~$35.8M is noted in the financial statements as a variance, likely due to social assistance ($7.36M) and other pass-through items not broken out in object schedule. OSR calculation results in negative because deferred revenue adjustments net against revenue. 12 fully consolidated subsidiaries. Several contingent liabilities noted including $343,876 claim, $250,000 union grievance, and potential $350,000 ISC recovery from 2013-2015 audit.
